# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

function generateAdminReport(PDO $pdo): array
{
    $status = isset($_POST['status']) ? trim((string)$_POST['status']) : null;
    $category = isset($_POST['category']) ? trim((string)$_POST['category']) : null;
    $dateFrom = isset($_POST['date_from']) ? trim((string)$_POST['date_from']) : null;
    $dateTo = isset($_POST['date_to']) ? trim((string)$_POST['date_to']) : null;

    $where = [];
    $params = [];

    if ($status !== null && $status !== '') {
        if (is_array($_POST['status'])) {
            $statuses = array_values(array_filter($_POST['status'], static function ($value) {
                return $value !== null && $value !== '';
            }));

            if (!empty($statuses)) {
                $placeholders = [];
                foreach ($statuses as $index => $value) {
                    $key = ':status_' . $index;
                    $placeholders[] = $key;
                    $params[$key] = $value;
                }
                $where[] = 'r.status IN (' . implode(', ', $placeholders) . ')';
            }
        } else {
            $where[] = 'r.status = :status';
            $params[':status'] = $status;
        }
    } elseif (isset($_POST['status']) && is_array($_POST['status'])) {
        $statuses = array_values(array_filter($_POST['status'], static function ($value) {
            return $value !== null && $value !== '';
        }));

        if (!empty($statuses)) {
            $placeholders = [];
            foreach ($statuses as $index => $value) {
                $key = ':status_' . $index;
                $placeholders[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $value;
            }
            $where[] = 'r.status IN (' . implode(', ', $placeholders) . ')';
        }
    }

    if ($category !== null && $category !== '') {
        if (is_array($_POST['category'])) {
            $categories = array_values(array_filter($_POST['category'], static function ($value) {
                return $value !== null && $value !== '';
            }));

            if (!empty($categories)) {
                $placeholders = [];
                foreach ($categories as $index => $value) {
                    $key = ':category_' . $index;
                    $placeholders[] = $key;
                    $params[$key] = $value;
                }
                $where[] = 'r.category IN (' . implode(', ', $placeholders) . ')';
            }
        } else {
            $where[] = 'r.category = :category';
            $params[':category'] = $category;
        }
    } elseif (isset($_POST['category']) && is_array($_POST['category'])) {
        $categories = array_values(array_filter($_POST['category'], static function ($value) {
            return $value !== null && $value !== '';
        }));

        if (!empty($categories)) {
            $placeholders = [];
            foreach ($categories as $index => $value) {
                $key = ':category_' . $index;
                $placeholders[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $value;
            }
            $where[] = 'r.category IN (' . implode(', ', $placeholders) . ')';
        }
    }

    if ($dateFrom !== null && $dateFrom !== '') {
        $from = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $dateFrom);
        if ($from && $from->format('Y-m-d') === $dateFrom) {
            $where[] = 'r.created_at >= :date_from';
            $params[':date_from'] = $from->format('Y-m-d 00:00:00');
        }
    }

    if ($dateTo !== null && $dateTo !== '') {
        $to = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $dateTo);
        if ($to && $to->format('Y-m-d') === $dateTo) {
            $where[] = 'r.created_at <= :date_to';
            $params[':date_to'] = $to->format('Y-m-d 23:59:59');
        }
    }

    $sql = "
        SELECT
            r.id,
            r.title,
            r.status,
            r.category,
            r.amount,
            r.created_at
        FROM reports r
    ";

    if (!empty($where)) {
        $sql .= ' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where);
    }

    $sql .= ' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC';

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);

    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, PDO::PARAM_STR);
    }

    $stmt->execute();
    $rows = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $summarySql = "
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
            COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount
        FROM reports r
    ";

    if (!empty($where)) {
        $summarySql .= ' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where);
    }

    $summaryStmt = $pdo->prepare($summarySql);

    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $summaryStmt->bindValue($key, $value, PDO::PARAM_STR);
    }

    $summaryStmt->execute();
    $summary = $summaryStmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    return [
        'filters' => [
            'status' => $_POST['status'] ?? null,
            'category' => $_POST['category'] ?? null,
            'date_from' => $dateFrom,
            'date_to' => $dateTo,
        ],
        'sql' => $sql,
        'params' => $params,
        'summary' => [
            'total_rows' => isset($summary['total_rows']) ? (int)$summary['total_rows'] : 0,
            'total_amount' => isset($summary['total_amount']) ? (float)$summary['total_amount'] : 0.0,
        ],
        'data' => $rows,
    ];
}
